archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Legal SaaS)

grid_system.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-[#1a56db] text-white rounded-[24px] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#1546b3] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#111827] border border-[#ebebeb] rounded-[24px] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#111827] rounded-[24px] px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors
buttons.danger: bg-red-50 text-red-600 border border-red-200 rounded-[24px] px-5 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-red-100 transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white border border-[#ebebeb] border-[0.5px] rounded-[14px] shadow-sm p-5 md:p-6

badges.base: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

inputs.base: block w-full rounded-lg border-[#ebebeb] shadow-sm focus:border-[#1a56db] focus:ring-[#1a56db] sm:text-sm py-2 px-3 text-gray-900 bg-white
inputs.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1

tables.wrapper: overflow-hidden shadow-sm ring-1 ring-[#ebebeb] sm:rounded-[14px] bg-white
tables.header: bg-gray-50 text-left text-xs font-medium text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider

interactive_and_motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must change color or shadow on hover. Cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-0.5) if clickable.
interactive_and_motion.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons, links, and cards.
interactive_and_motion.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all inputs and buttons: focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1a56db] focus:ring-offset-2

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every button, input, link, and interactive component must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on its role.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA or WCAG AA standards. Ensure risk colors have sufficient contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.aria: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons (like close modals, upload drops).

lawyer_sarah.description: Sarah Mitchell, Esq. - Woman in black blazer smiling

lawyer_james.description: James Carter, Esq. - Man with beard wearing a suit

lawyer_diana.description: Diana Torres, Esq. - Woman with arms crossed

lawyer_marcus.description: Marcus Johnson, Esq. - Man in suit sitting

lawyer_rachel.description: Rachel Kim, Esq. - Person in suit sitting

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Strictly implement the color palette and border radii. Cards MUST use rounded-[14px] and buttons MUST use rounded-[24px].
instructions_to_main_agent.2: The sidebar MUST be exactly 220px wide, sticky/fixed, with a white background and 0.5px solid #ebebeb border on the right.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: App background is #f8f8f8, while cards are #ffffff. Maintain this contrast.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Ensure the 'Risk Score' component accurately reflects the colors: 0-30 (Green), 31-60 (Orange), 61-100 (Red).
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do NOT use placeholder images. Map the provided avatar URLs to their respective lawyer names in the grid.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add specific `data-testid` values for every interaction point (e.g., `data-testid="upload-document-zone"`, `data-testid="book-lawyer-sarah-btn"`).
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Include Google fonts 'Outfit' and 'Inter' via Tailwind or CSS.
